title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers systems security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices for protecting data from cyber threats. The lecture is the final installment of CS50 for Business, available through Harvard's edX platform and other institutional channels. This is foundational security awareness content aimed at business professionals.
